dishes.name: Fluffy Pancakes (Dozen)
dishes.raw_description: Try our favorite pancake recipe, fluffy and so yummy, we love it, and for sure you will too! Our pancakes come with fresh berries and pure organic maple syrup.
dishes.reasoning: Standard pancakes contain eggs, milk, and butter. | evidence: “Our pancakes come with fresh berries and pure organic maple syrup”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: FONDANT CHOCOLATE (6 individual cups)
dishes.raw_description: We are melting for this chocolate dose. Heat 10 secondes in the microwave before serving for a chocolate melting experience! You can also enjoy it fresh with some ice cream, such a delish !
dishes.reasoning: No mention of ingredients; chocolate fondant often contains butter or cream. | evidence: “Heat 10 secondes in the microwave before serving”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: French Brioche (2 medium size - 2*9oz)
dishes.raw_description: These Brioches are a perfect gift, to be enjoyed around a cafe table with family and friends. You can fill each one of it with your favorites ingredients between: - Chocolate chips - Belgian pearl sugar - Homemade Jam (made with only 3 ingredients: fruits, sugar and lemon!)
dishes.reasoning: Brioche dough contains butter and eggs. | evidence: “filled with - Chocolate chips - Belgian pearl sugar - Homemade Jam”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: French Brioche (Large - 1 pound)
dishes.raw_description: This large Brioche is perfect as a gift, to be enjoyed around a cafe gourmand with family and friends. The large French brioche comes with Belgian pearl sugar, our favorite flavor.
dishes.reasoning: Brioche dough contains butter and eggs. | evidence: “comes with Belgian pearl sugar”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: French Crêpes (Dozen)
dishes.raw_description: Try our delicious French Crêpes Freshly Handmade everyday ! Our Crêpes come with Nutella and Bonne Maman strawberry jam
dishes.reasoning: Traditional crêpes contain eggs and milk, and Nutella has dairy. | evidence: “Our Crêpes come with Nutella and Bonne Maman strawberry jam”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: FRUITS BOARD (5-6 people)
dishes.raw_description: An artistic board to enjoy with your family, friends and beloved ones. Compose your own by choosing 7 fruits from the list below: Watermelon Pineapple Kiwi Grapes Mango Orange Dragon fruit Cantaloupe Strawberries Blueberries Raspberries Blackberries
dishes.reasoning: All listed fruits are plant-based. | evidence: “Compose your own by choosing 7 fruits from the list: Watermelon... Blackberries”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: Individual French Brioches (Dozen)
dishes.raw_description: Our French brioches are so fluffy and have that smell that makes you travel right to a Parisian Bakery. Try our homemade French Brioche, filled with - Chocolate chips - Belgian pearl sugar - Pure homemade jam (made with only 3 ingredients, fruits, sugar and lemon!)
dishes.reasoning: Brioche dough contains butter and eggs. | evidence: “filled with - Chocolate chips - Belgian pearl sugar - Pure homemade jam”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA

dishes.name: PARISIAN BRUNCH (2-4 people)
dishes.raw_description: This fresh 2-4 people brunch comprises your favorite combination: SWEETS (pick 2 choices) - Fluffy homemade pancakes - Mini croissant - French homemade Crêpes - Parfait SAVORIES (pick 1 choice) - Everything Bagel: Cream cheese, avocado, salmon and cucumber - Bruschetta: Cream cheese, caramelized cherry tomatoes with garlic, basil and balsamic vinegar ACCOMPANIMENTS (pick 2 choices) - Bonne maman strawberries jam - Nutella - Pure maple syrup - Amish Butter MIX OF FRUITS AND BERRIES
dishes.reasoning: Every sweet and savory choice contains dairy, eggs, or fish; no fully vegan option available. | evidence: “SWEETS (pick 2 choices) - Fluffy homemade pancakes - Mini croissant - French homemade Crêpes - Parfait; SAVORIES... Everything Bagel: Cream cheese, avocado, salmon and cucumber”
dishes.address: 304 Majestic Cypress Pt, Longwood, FL 32750, USA
